title: Philippine troops kill 10 suspected Muslim militants in deadliest clash so far this year
summary_full: Philippine forces engaged in a fierce gun battle in Lanao del Sur, eliminating ten suspected Muslim militants, including their commander Amerol Mangoranca. This marks the deadliest clash this year in the southern region, where smaller rebel groups continue sporadic attacks despite a 2014 peace deal.
